summary: P1.1: schema migration — add model+prompt_version cols, backfill, add partial UNIQUE index on (chunk_id, concept_id, model, prompt_version) WHERE status='pending'

resolution.note: Schema migration applied to data/guru.db. model+prompt_version backfilled split by id<1000 (unknown-pre-v3) vs id>=1000 (qwen3.5-27b). Partial UNIQUE index on (chunk_id, concept_id, model, prompt_version) WHERE status='pending' creates a SQL-level barrier against re-tag dupes within same provenance. Pre-migration snapshot + integrity check + 47/47 tests + parity harness green.
